description: System diagnostic: collect OS, CPU, RAM, disk, network info
command:
import platform, os, socket
print('=' * 50)
print('  SYSTEM DIAGNOSTIC REPORT')
print('=' * 50)
print()
print('[OS]')
print('  System   :', platform.system())
print('  Release  :', platform.release())
print('  Version  :', platform.version())
print('  Machine  :', platform.machine())
print('  Processor:', platform.processor())
print()
print('[USER]')
print('  Username :', os.getlogin())
print('  Home     :', os.path.expanduser('~'))
print('  CWD      :', os.getcwd())
print()
print('[NETWORK]')
print('  Hostname :', socket.gethostname())
try:
    print('  Local IP :', socket.gethostbyname(socket.gethostname()))
except:
    print('  Local IP : N/A')
print()
print('[DISK - C:]')
try:
    import shutil
    total, used, free = shutil.disk_usage('C:\\')
    print('  Total    :', round(total / (1024**3), 1), 'GB')
    print('  Used     :', round(used / (1024**3), 1), 'GB')
    print('  Free     :', round(free / (1024**3), 1), 'GB')
    print('  Usage    :', round(used / total * 100, 1), '%')
except:
    print('  N/A')
print()
print('[PYTHON]')
print('  Version  :', platform.python_version())
print('  Compiler :', platform.python_compiler())
print()
print('=' * 50)
print('  Diagnostic complete!')
print('=' * 50)
